source.source_design_doc: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/道具/2-设计/<主体名称>.md

local_sync.local_asset_path: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/道具/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.<ext>
local_sync.download_command: libtv download -p <LIBTV_CANVAS_UUID> -n <LIBTV_NODE_ID_OR_NAME> -o projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/道具/3-生成 | not_applicable_when_already_present_or_copied

output.output_image: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/道具/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.png
output.output_prompt_json: projects/aigc/<项目名>/3-主体/道具/3-生成/<主体ID>-<主体名称>-主图.json

critical_requirements: Use the corresponding prop/subject design document's section `4. 解构` as the primary source of truth.
Generate one single-subject prop image only; do not redesign the prop, add characters, or turn it into a scene poster.
Preserve the upstream subject identity, silhouette, scale logic, material facts, wear state, narrative function, style, and negative constraints.
Do not use the former English integrated prompt from `提示词设计` as the imported source for Midjourney V8.1; use the deconstruction content instead.
prompt_payload.assembled_prompt: <SOURCE_DECONSTRUCTION_QUOTE + concise libTV canvas-node execution wrapper + midjourney_suffix>
prompt_payload.state_variant_policy: When asset_preflight.asset_reuse_decision is generate_state_variant, use Lib Image with the base reference node and describe only the state delta while preserving object identity, material, scale, style, and 3:2 aspect.
prompt_payload.negative_prompt: no people, no hands, no character takeover, no product lineup, no multi-object collection unless explicitly defined upstream, no redesign, no unrelated background story
